title: Brownfields Assessments and Remediations
summary: Seeking proposals to conduct Phase I and Phase II environmental site assessments and remediation services, and to develop a five-year QAPP for an EPA CERCLA 128a grant.

title: Community-Wide Infrastructure, Engineering, Environmental, and Strategic Planning Services
summary: Solicit proposals from qualified multidisciplinary professional service firms to provide engineering, environmental, planning, surveying, GIS, asset management, and strategic infrastructure consulting services for water systems, environmental programs, wastewater infrastructure, housing development, transportation, and land services.
